report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Sui Blockchain Guide 2026 (architecture, ecosystem, tokenomics) and Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 (strategies, tools, tax implications) — filling major L1 coverage and portfolio management content gaps.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified Sui blockchain and crypto portfolio rebalancing as two significant content gaps — no dedicated Sui guide despite it being a top-10 L1 by developer growth (219% YoY), and no rebalancing guide despite existing portfolio tools

Sui: $623M TVL (down from $2.6B peak), 297K TPS with sub-second finality via Mysticeti consensus, object-centric Move language architecture. Key 2026 developments: USDsui stablecoin launch (March 4), HashKey Exchange listing (Feb 4), private transactions via ZKP, 42.9M SUI token unlock in April

Portfolio Rebalancing: 15% threshold-based rebalancing outperformed HODL by 77.1% (Shrimpy 2018-2022 study). No crypto wash-sale rule in 2026 creates unique tax-loss harvesting opportunity. DeFi-native tools (Index Coop, TokenSets, Enzyme) represent the 2026 frontier
Competitive landscape: CoinGecko has a basic Sui overview but no comprehensive guide. No major competitor has a dedicated crypto rebalancing strategies guide with tool comparisons

sections.title: Content Created
items: Sui Blockchain Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, 13 min read) — covers what Sui is, object-centric architecture & Move language, key metrics dashboard, DeFi ecosystem (NAVI, Scallop $244M TVL, Cetus), stablecoins (USDsui, suiUSDe), gaming (Samurai Shodown, EVE Frontier), SUI tokenomics (10B supply, allocation breakdown, vesting to 2030), Sui vs Solana vs Aptos comparison table, risks (centralization, outages, unlock pressure), 2026 roadmap

Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 (~2,600 words, 12 min read) — covers rebalancing definition & crypto volatility context, strategy comparison (time-based vs threshold-based vs hybrid), DCA vs rebalancing complementarity, tax implications (1099-DA changes, tax-loss harvesting), tool comparison (Shrimpy, 3Commas, CoinStats), DeFi-native rebalancing (Index Coop, TokenSets, Enzyme, Beefy), practical tips & common mistakes, risk-adjusted approaches (volatility-weighted, 4.2x Sharpe improvement)
Both guides include 4 FAQs each targeting high-search-volume questions, 4-5 internal links to existing degen0x pages, and related articles sections

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Sui Guide: title 'Sui Blockchain Guide 2026: Architecture, DeFi & SUI Token Explained | degen0x' (72 chars), target keywords: Sui blockchain, SUI token, Move language, Sui DeFi, Sui vs Solana

Rebalancing Guide: title 'Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026: Strategies & Tools | degen0x' (69 chars), target keywords: crypto portfolio rebalancing, rebalancing strategies, portfolio rebalancing tools, crypto tax-loss harvesting
Both pages use Article JSON-LD schema via ArticleStructuredData component, FAQPage schema via FAQStructuredData component, and BreadcrumbList schema via Breadcrumb component
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, Twitter summary_large_image cards, and dynamic OG images via /api/og endpoint
